_note: Analyst-estimated player params pending a live xG / penalty-taker feed. Teams absent from the StatsBomb WC2018/2022 dataset (e.g. Scotland 2026) are maintained here by hand. Replace `source: analyst_estimate` records as real data lands.

_schema.name: string
_schema.npxg_share: player's share of team NON-penalty xG, 0..1
_schema.penalty_taker: bool — designated taker gets the pen_xg top-up
